project.name: LAMBDA Data Agent
project.description: Large Model Based Data Agent with Q1 Triadic Evolution (Proposer-Solver-Verifier) and MDL Epiplexity scoring

nodes.name: LAMBDA.py
nodes.summary: Core agent class that orchestrates the conversation, programmer, and inspector components

nodes.name: lambda_app.py
nodes.summary: Main Gradio web interface entry point for the application

nodes.name: conversation.py
nodes.summary: Manages conversation history and formatting for the LLM

nodes.name: kernel.py
nodes.summary: Jupyter kernel execution environment to safely run LLM-generated Python code

nodes.name: programmer.py
nodes.summary: SOLVER Agent: generates Python code to solve data analysis tasks proposed by the Proposer

nodes.name: inspector.py
nodes.summary: VERIFIER Agent: judges code correctness and computes MDL Epiplexity score for Goldilocks filtering

nodes.name: proposer.py
nodes.summary: PROPOSER Agent: mines knowledge graph nodes for context and generates grounded data analysis tasks with controlled difficulty

nodes.name: cache.py
nodes.summary: Data cache manager for handling uploaded files (CSV, Excel, ODS) and generating metadata

nodes.name: prompts.py
nodes.summary: Contains all the system prompts for the programmer and inspector agents

nodes.name: config.yaml
nodes.summary: System configuration including LLM endpoints, API keys, and model parameters

nodes.name: DGM_lambda.py
nodes.summary: Darwin Gödel Machine evolution engine with EvolutionaryScheduler implementing Triadic cycle (Proposer→Solver→Verifier) and Archive with Goldilocks filter

nodes.name: lambda_eval.py
nodes.summary: 4-stage fitness evaluation pipeline: Syntax → Import → Pytest → Epiplexity Filter (Goldilocks Zone)

layers.name: Core Orchestration
layers.description: Main application logic and agent coordination

layers.name: Triadic LLM Agents
layers.description: The three agent roles: Proposer (task generation), Solver (code writing), Verifier (correctness + epiplexity)

layers.name: Darwin Gödel Machine
layers.description: Self-evolving engine with Archive, Goldilocks filter, and Epiplexity scoring

tour.title: System Entry
tour.description: The application starts here using Gradio to provide a web interface for users.

tour.title: Agent Orchestrator
tour.description: The LAMBDA class coordinates the chat history and manages the underlying sub-agents.

tour.title: Triadic Agents (Q1 Paper)
tour.description: The Proposer generates tasks from the knowledge graph, the Solver (Programmer) writes code, and the Verifier (Inspector) judges correctness with MDL Epiplexity scoring.

tour.title: Code Execution
tour.description: Python code is executed safely in the Jupyter kernel sandbox.

tour.title: DGM Evolution Engine
tour.description: The EvolutionaryScheduler runs the Triadic cycle, evaluates mutations through the 4-stage pipeline (Syntax→Import→Pytest→Epiplexity), and archives only Goldilocks-zone generations.
